compiled_state.title: RED test: coverage harness counts precondition preventions per corpus bug
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write `test_coverage_harness_counts_preventions` BEFORE implementing the harness.

Given: sample-bugs.json corpus exists at tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json
When: coverage harness is run (script not yet implemented)
Then: harness exits 0 and emits COVERAGE_RESULT JSON to stdout with preventions_count >= 100, per the contract in plugins/dso/docs/contracts/coverage-harness-output.md

The test MUST FAIL (RED) until `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh` is implemented.

## Test Approach
Given: corpus fixture exists but coverage harness script does not yet exist
When: test attempts to run `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh`
Then: script-not-found failure → test fails RED

## Implementation Notes
Create `tests/scripts/test-818-coverage-harness.sh` that:
1. Sources tests/lib/assert.sh
2. Checks corpus fixture exists at tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json (skip if absent with meaningful message)
3. Attempts to run `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh --corpus=tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json --dry-run`
4. Asserts exit 0
5. Parses COVERAGE_RESULT line from stdout
6. Asserts preventions_count >= 100
7. Asserts corpus_size matches fixture length
8. Asserts passed == true (threshold met)

Update `.test-index`:
`plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh: tests/scripts/test-818-coverage-harness.sh [test_coverage_harness_counts_preventions]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes with RED marker honored
  Verify: grep '\[test_coverage_harness_counts_preventions\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-818-coverage-harness.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present
  Verify: grep '\[test_coverage_harness_counts_preventions\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test fails RED before harness implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-818-coverage-harness.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
